Tests the behavior of Math.pow with negative zero and a negative exponent.

# Purpose
This code is a single assertion statement that tests the behavior of the `Math.pow` function in JavaScript. It checks if raising negative zero (`-0`) to the power of negative one hundred (`-100`) results in positive infinity (`Infinity`). This test is likely used to verify the correctness of the `Math.pow` function's handling of edge cases involving negative zero and negative exponents. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific mathematical operation and its expected result.
